sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91771" key="purnoto/kos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πυρνοτόκος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n91771.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">food-producing</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἄρουρα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Hymn.Is.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">45</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
